scope: Cycle 9: bug hunt on C8 files + encounter_card_overlay.gd v2 typewriter + screen_dither_layer.gd fixes

bugs_found.description: minigame.start() never called — BUG-022 was marked fixed in C8 status but code was never pushed to main. Minigames hung on await forever.
No timeout on await minigame.game_completed — if minigame crashes or never emits, encounter card overlay hangs permanently.
bugs_found.fix: Added 90s SceneTreeTimer timeout that force-completes minigame with penalty score 15

bugs_found.description: set_color_levels() always used 'color_levels' param regardless of render mode — PSX shader uses 'color_depth'. BUG-023 was marked fixed but never pushed.
:= style violation in tween_parameter() — code style forbids := with inferred types
bugs_found.fix: Changed var tw := create_tween() to var tw: Tween = create_tween()

coherence_issues.description: Cycle 8 committed only status files (a953597) but no code changes. encounter_card_overlay.gd and screen_dither_layer.gd edits were lost. Status files falsely reported BUG-022/023 as fixed and CARD-OVERLAY-V2 as completed.
coherence_issues.resolution: Cycle 9 re-applied all fixes plus additional improvements

overall_assessment: Cycle 9: 2 HIGH + 2 LOW bugs fixed. 1 critical coherence issue discovered and resolved. Encounter card overlay now has typewriter text, staggered buttons, field hint, and timeout safety. 26 total bugs fixed across 9 cycles.
